summary: All four steps of the 'New User Creates Their First Task' journey passed successfully. Registration returned a 201 with user ID, login via NextAuth CSRF flow established a valid session, task creation returned a 201 with correct title and auto-assigned userId, and listing tasks showed the newly created task. The API also properly validates empty/missing required fields for both registration and task creation.

steps.action: POST /api/auth/register with email newuser_journey_test@example.com, name Journey Tester, password MySecurePass99
steps.verification: Got 201 status with JSON containing id, email, and name matching the registration input

steps.action: GET /api/auth/csrf then POST /api/auth/callback/credentials with csrfToken, email, and password as form data
steps.verification: GET /api/auth/session returned user object with correct name, email, id, and future expiry date

steps.action: POST /api/tasks with title 'Buy groceries' and description 'Milk and eggs' using session cookies
steps.verification: Got 201 status. Response contains id cmnfbdkqv0003oorx2k4kl83d, title 'Buy groceries', description 'Milk and eggs', status 'TODO', correct userId matching the registered user
Got 200 status with array containing exactly one task matching the created task (id, title 'Buy groceries', description 'Milk and eggs')

break_findings.description: Sent POST /api/tasks with empty title, missing title, and empty body
break_findings.result: All three requests correctly returned 400 with error 'Title is required'

break_findings.description: Sent POST /api/auth/register with empty email, empty password, empty name, and empty body
break_findings.result: All four requests correctly returned 400 with error 'All fields are required'
